story.title: Who we are
story.quote: Transparent AI that works for your business — not the other way around.
story.p1: MaOs AI Agency is a team focused on AI automation for business: sales, leads, communication, and internal processes.
story.p2: Our approach is dark minimalism in the product and maximum clarity in processes: you see what AI does and control every step.
story.p3: We work transparently, launch MVPs fast, and scale solutions as you grow.

quality.title: Code quality
quality.description: Clean architecture, typing, Vercel-ready deploys, and cloud integrations.

speed.description: First results in weeks, not months — iterations with measurable impact.
